title: Rocket Mons [Cobblemon]
description: A mod that adds Celesteela to cobblemon
body:
By popular demand, this is a reupload of my RocketMons addon which I originally uploaded on curseforge ([Original post](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rocket-mons)).

This is an addon which includes a fully animated and fully textured model of Celesteela. I might also add other pokémon in the future if there's interest.

Currently, Celesteela can be found if you build a proper landing strip at very high altitude (300+ blocks) in certain hot biomes.
